ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that owns the financial statement */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow statement) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial statement */,
  "fiscal_quarter" INTEGER /* Fiscal quarter of the financial statement */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the financial statement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the financial statement is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial statement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement that owns this income statement */,
  "particulars" TEXT /* Description of the income statement item (e.g., Sales Turnover, Excise Duty) */,
  "mar_2022" REAL /* Value of the income statement item for March 2022 */,
  "mar_2021" REAL /* Value of the income statement item for March 2021 */,
  "mar_2020" REAL /* Value of the income statement item for March 2020 */,
  "mar_2019" REAL /* Value of the income statement item for March 2019 */,
  "mar_2018" REAL /* Value of the income statement item for March 2018 */,
  "mar_2017" REAL /* Value of the income statement item for March 2017 */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the income statement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the income statement is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the income statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the income statement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the income statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id", "particulars")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry that the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)
